prompt: Edit image 1 to display object detection results on the raised hands. Style the detection overlays with the glowing lens aesthetic from image 2, and incorporate the reflective distortion effect from image 3 into the visual representation.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to display object detection results on the raised hands. Style the detection overlays with the glowing lens aesthetic from image 2, characterized by a prominent, luminous circular glow or flare around each detected hand. Additionally, incorporate the reflective distortion effect from image 3 into the visual representation of these overlays, making them appear to reflect and distort their immediate surroundings, similar to the water droplets.
objects: object detection overlays on raised hands
luminous circular glow around object detection overlays
reflective distortion on object detection overlays
